title: Which cards need to be replaced?
body:
Once replacement cards are created, the previous cards will be permanently deactivated
Cards will arrive by mail in around 7-10 business days
Any remaining balance on the previous card will automatically be rolled over to the replacement card
labelWhichId: Which ID number can you provide? *
optionHelperStudentId: This is a unique 10-digit number assigned to your child. Their school may be able to provide it if you do not know it.
optionHelperMedicaidId: This number can be found on your child's Medicaid program notices and is typically 7 or 8 digits long.
optionHelperSnapCaseNumber: This number can be found on your child's SNAP program notices and is typically 7 or 8 digits long.
optionHelperTanfId: This number can be found on your child's Colorado Works (TANF) program notices and is typically 7 or 8 digits long.
labelEnterMedicaidId: Enter their Medicaid identification number (CIN / I-CIN)
labelEnterTanfId: Enter their Colorado Works (TANF) identification number
alertActionLogIntoPortal: Contact us if you can't provide any of the suggested ID numbers.
body1: We can send replacement cards if
body2:
You haven't received them in the mail after two weeks
Or you no longer have them
summaryAddress: New cards will be mailed to the following address:
labelSelectCards: Select which cards you want to replace
